# Haulage.app — Compliance + workflow tooling for UK haulage operators
# https://haulage.app
# Updated: 2026-05-21
# Maintained for AI crawlers, agents, and answer-engine citations.

## About

Haulage.app is the trade-vertical front-door for UK haulage operators using MEOK AI
Labs compliance MCP servers. It surfaces the haulage-uk-compliance-mcp Stripe
products and links to a small set of haulage-adjacent MCPs (NRSWA, CHAS Elite Prep,
construction-iso-19650, crane-hire-cpcs, concrete-pump-cpa).

- Operated by: MEOK AI Labs (trading name of CSOAI LTD, UK Companies House 16939677)
- Founder: Nicholas Templeman
- Contact: hello@meok.ai
- Underlying MCP: https://pypi.org/project/haulage-uk-compliance-mcp/

## Topics covered

- UK Operator Licence (3.5T+ goods vehicles)
- Tachograph compliance + drivers' hours rules
- DVSA roadside inspection prep
- NRSWA / street works compliance
- CHAS / SafeContractor / Constructionline pre-qualification

## Related

- Sister site: meok.ai — full MEOK compliance MCP catalogue
- Sister site: grabhire.ai, muckaway.ai, planthire.ai — trade-vertical sub-brands
- Parent: CSOAI LTD legal entity at csoai.org
